intent: Improve clarity — enforce 3-second rule, one concept per sentence, define jargon

edits.search: Local+RoPE layers handle positional grammar (subject-verb distance, adjective-noun binding); global_nope layers handle semantic lookup ("what was the user's name from 6000 tokens ago?"). Residual connections merge both: by layer 48, the hidden state carries positional and content-based information simultaneously.
edits.replace: Local+RoPE layers handle positional grammar (subject-verb distance, adjective-noun binding); global_nope layers handle semantic lookup ("what was the user's name from 6000 tokens ago?"). Because every layer adds its output to the residual stream (the skip connection that accumulates across all 48 layers), both types of signal accumulate in the same hidden state — by layer 48, it carries positional and content-based information simultaneously.
